data.title: Save big on Byte Packs for Vexi Villages! Gala Games offers up to 60% discounts in a limited-time sale from Sept 4, 2025.
data.description: Starting from September 4, 2025, Gala Games is introducing a limited-time sale where customers can avail discounts of up to 60% on Byte Packs designed for Vexi Villages. This exclusive offer presents lucrative savings on these packs, allowing players to enhance their gaming experience at a fraction of the regular price. Don't miss this opportunity to secure Byte Packs for Vexi Villages at significantly reduced rates during the promotional period.

data.title: Bitcoin holders remain optimistic as they buy the dip in hopes of a daily close above $112K. Markets await US jobs report. Traders continue to purchase despite uncertainties.
data.description: The anticipation is mounting in the bitcoin and stock markets in anticipation of Friday's US jobs report. Traders are showing signs of nervousness as they await the release of this key economic data. Despite this apprehension, market data indicates that investors are still inclined to buy when prices drop. This demonstrates resilience in the face of uncertainty.

Wildfires likely to have been made more frequent by climate change made significant contributions to air pollution last year, according to a report by the World Meteorological Organization (WMO) on Friday.

The World Health Organization says ambient air pollution causes 4.5 million premature deaths a year, and the WMO report for 2024 pointed to pollution hotspots in places that experienced intense fires such as the Amazon basin, Canada, Siberia and central Africa.

data.title: Haier signs partnerships in football with Liverpool FC, Paris Saint-Germain, La Liga Portugal, and others. Leading in global retail volume.
data.description: Haier continues to strengthen its global sports partnership strategy by collaborating with LALIGA, La Liga Portugal, the Royal Moroccan Football Federation, and renewing its agreement with the ATP Tour. Leading in global retail volume, Haier solidifies its presence in the sports industry. The announcement was made in Berlin on September 5, 2025.

data.title: HUTCHMED presents clinical data at 2025 lung cancer conferences in Barcelona and Jinan.
data.description: HUTCHMED (China) Limited announced on September 5, 2025, that new and revised data from various studies of its compounds will be showcased at the 2025 World Conference on Lung Cancer in Barcelona, Spain from September 6-9, 2025, and at the Chinese Society of Clinical Oncology Annual Meeting 2025 in Jinan, China from September 10-14, 2025. HUTCHMED, listed on Nasdaq/AIM with code HCM and on HKEX as 13, continues its research and development efforts to present findings at these prestigious conferences.

data.title: Park Hotels & Resorts Inc. to report Q3 2025 results after market closes on Oct 30, with earnings call on Oct 31 at 11:00 AM ET. #business
data.description: TYSONS, Va.-- Park Hotels & Resorts Inc. (NYSE: PK) disclosed that it is set to unveil its financial outcomes for the third quarter of 2025 after the market closes on October 30, 2025. A conference call is scheduled for October 31, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time (ET), where discussions will revolve around the earnings report, operational status, and future prospects of the company. The call will be open for access via phone and internet.

data.title: American Outdoor Brands, Inc. reports Q1 2026 financial results showing $29.7M in net sales, down 28.7% YoY, resulting in a $(6.8M) net loss. The company remains debt-free with $17.8M in cash. Updates include an expanded partnership with Major League Fishing, aiming to launch SCORETRACKER LIVE in Spring 2026. Strategic initiatives and a strong financial position support long-term value. Detailed financial data is available in the company's press release.
data.description: American Outdoor Brands, Inc. announced its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal 2026, ending July 31, 2025. Quarterly net sales were $29.7 million, a decrease of 28.7% compared to the previous year. Gross margin was 46.7%. GAAP net loss was $6.8 million, while non-GAAP net loss was $3.3 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $(3.1) million. The company emphasized consumer pull-through and product innovation with new products representing 29% of sales. Net sales would have declined around 5% if adjusted for retailer order acceleration. The company also highlighted an expanded partnership with Major League Fishing for new product launches and recurring revenue. The balance sheet showed $17.8 million in cash and debt-free status. A conference call was scheduled to discuss the financial results.Overall, the company showcased the resilience of its brands and its strategic focus on innovation and consumer engagement during a challenging market environment. The full story is available on Benzinga.com for more details.
